bird.name: 草原松鸡
bird.summary: 草原松鸡（台湾作大草原榛雞）（学名：Tympanuchus cupido），是鸡形目雉科的一种鸟类。 特征 草原松鸡体重约870.08克，翼长约204.8毫米，嘴峰长约23.5毫米，喙宽度约8.7毫米，喙厚度约9毫米，跗蹠长约41.8毫米，尾长约82毫米。草原松鸡在其分布区内为…

relations.subject: 草原松鸡
relations.evidence: This North American species was once abundant but has become extremely rare or extirpated over much of its range due to habitat loss, natural disasters, and overhunting. Conservation measures are underway to ensure the sustainability of existing small populations
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 草原松鸡
relations.evidence: |title=Steam-boating on the Ohio and Mississippi Before the Civil War |url=https://scholarworks.iu.edu/journals/index.php/imh/article/view/5927 |journal=Indiana Magazine of History |publisher=Indiana University Press |volume=XI |issue=2 |pages=99–127 |issn=0019-6673 |jstor=27785676 |oclc=61313105 |jstor-access=free}} The greater prairie-chicken was almost extinct in the 1930s due to hunting pressure and habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
